posts.text: еңЁе®үеҚ“дёӯпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁеҶ…е®№жҸҗдҫӣеҷЁContentResolverжқҘиҺ·еҸ–е…¶д»–еә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸзҡ„ж•°жҚ®пјҡ Cursor cursor = getContentResolver().query(ContactsContract.CommonDataKinds.Phone.CONTENT_URI,null,null,null,null); public final @Nullable Cursor query(@RequiresPermission.Read @NonNull Uri uri, @Nullable String[] projection, @Nullable String selection, @Nullable String[] selectionArgs, @Nullable String sortOrder) { return query(uri, projection, selection, selectionArgs, sortOrder, null);} зұ»дјјдёҠйқўзҡ„иҺ·еҸ–CursorпјҢе…¶дёӯзҡ„еҸӮж•°еҲҶеҲ«жңүд»ҘдёӢеҗ«д№үпјҡ uriпјҡжҢҮе®ҡжҹҗдёҖеә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸдёӢзҡ„жҹҗдёҖеј иЎЁ(lзұ»дјјSQLдёӯ from table_name),жіЁж„ҸдёҖзӮ№пјҢдҪҝз”Ёж—¶иҰҒжҸҗеүҚз”іиҜ·и®ҝй—®ж•°жҚ®жқғйҷҗ вҖӢ eg content://com.example.app.provider/table1 вҖӢ Uri uri = Uri.parse("content://com.example.app.provider/table1"); projection:жҢҮе®ҡжҹҘиҜўзҡ„еҲ—еҗҚпјҲзұ»дјјSQLдёӯ select column1,column2пјү selection:жҢҮе®ҡwhereзҡ„зәҰжқҹжқЎд»¶пјҲзұ»дјјSQLдёӯ where column = valueпјү selectionArgs:дёәд»ҘдёҠжқЎд»¶жҢҮе®ҡе…·дҪ“зҡ„жҢҮпјҲзӣёеҪ“дәҺSQLдёӯwhereеҚ дҪҚз¬ҰжҸҗдҫӣзҡ„е…·дҪ“зҡ„еҖјпјү orderByпјҡжҢҮе®ҡжҹҘиҜўз»“жһңзҡ„жҺ’еәҸж–№ејҸпјҲзұ»дјјSQLдёӯ order by column1,column2пјү з”Ёд»ҘдёҠж–№жі•иҺ·еҸ–еҲ°жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„cursorеҗҺпјҢеҸҜз”Ёд»ҘдёӢж–№ејҸиҺ·еҸ–пјҡ if (cursor!=null){ while (cursor.moveToNext()){ //йҖҡиҝҮжҢҮе®ҡзҡ„еҲ—еҗҚиҺ·еҸ–зӣёеә”зҡ„ж•°жҚ® String displayName = cursor.getString(cursor.getColumnIndex(ContactsContract.CommonDataKinds.Phone.DISPLAY_NAME)); }} зұ»дјјSQLiteж•°жҚ®жҸ’е…Ҙзҡ„ж–№ејҸпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»Ҙз”Ёд»ҘдёӢзҡ„ж–№ејҸеҗ‘жҢҮе®ҡиЎЁдёӯж·»еҠ ж•°жҚ®пјҡ ContentValues values = new ContentValues();values.put("column1","text");values.put("column2",1);getContentResolver().insert(uri,values); жӣҙж–°ж•°жҚ®пјҡ ContentValues values1 = new ContentValues();values.put("column1","");//еҲ©з”Ёselection е’Ң selectionArgsеҸӮж•°жқҘзәҰжқҹйңҖиҰҒжӣҙж–°зҡ„жқЎд»¶getContentResolver().update(uri,values,"column1 = ? and column2 = ?",new String[]{"text",1}); еҲ йҷӨж•°жҚ®пјҡ //еҲ йҷӨжҢҮе®ҡеҲ—column2дёӯеҖјдёә1зҡ„ж•°жҚ®getContentResolver().delete(uri,"column2 = ?",new String[]{"1"}); е®һзҺ°иҮӘе®ҡд№үContentProvider е…ҲзңӢдёҖдёӢContentProviderдёӯдё»иҰҒзҡ„еҮ дёӘж–№жі•пјҡ onCreateпјҲпјүпјҡеҲқе§ӢеҢ–еҶ…е®№жҸҗдҫӣеҷЁзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷи°ғз”ЁгҖӮйҖҡеёёдјҡеңЁиҝҷйҮҢе®ҢжҲҗеҜ№ж•°жҚ®еә“зҡ„еҲӣе»әе’ҢеҚҮзә§зӯүж“ҚдҪңпјҢиҝ”еӣһtrueиЎЁзӨәеҶ…е®№жҸҗдҫӣеҷЁеҲқе§ӢеҢ–жҲҗеҠҹпјҢиҝ”еӣһfalseеҲҷиЎЁзӨәеӨұиҙҘгҖӮжіЁж„ҸпјҢеҸӘжңүеҪ“еӯҳеңЁContentResolverе°қиҜ•и®ҝй—®жҲ‘д»¬зЁӢеәҸдёӯзҡ„ж•°жҚ®ж—¶пјҢеҶ…е®№жҸҗдҫӣеҷЁжүҚдјҡиў«еҲқе§ӢеҢ–гҖӮ queryпјҲпјүпјҡд»ҺеҶ…е®№жҸҗдҫӣеҷЁдёӯжҹҘиҜўж•°жҚ®гҖӮдҪҝз”ЁuriеҸӮж•°жқҘзЎ®е®ҡжҹҘиҜўе“Әеј иЎЁпјҢprojectionеҸӮж•°з”ЁдәҺзЎ®е®ҡжҹҘиҜўе“ӘдәӣеҲ—пјҢselectionе’ҢselectionArgsеҸӮж•°з”ЁдәҺзәҰжқҹжҹҘиҜўе“ӘдәӣиЎҢпјҢsortOrderеҸӮж•°з”ЁдәҺеҜ№з»“жһңиҝӣиЎҢжҺ’еәҸпјҢжҹҘиҜўзҡ„з»“жһңеӯҳж”ҫеңЁCursorеҜ№иұЎдёӯиҝ”еӣһгҖӮ insertпјҲпјүпјҡеҗ‘еҶ…е®№жҸҗдҫӣеҷЁдёӯж·»еҠ дёҖжқЎж•°жҚ®гҖӮдҪҝз”ЁuriеҸӮж•°жқҘзЎ®е®ҡиҰҒж·»еҠ еҲ°зҡ„иЎЁпјҢеҫ…ж·»еҠ зҡ„ж•°жҚ®дҝқеӯҳеңЁvaluesеҸӮж•°дёӯгҖӮж·»еҠ е®ҢжҲҗеҗҺпјҢиҝ”еӣһдёҖдёӘз”ЁдәҺиЎЁзӨәиҝҷжқЎи®°еҪ•зҡ„URIгҖӮ updateпјҲпјүпјҡжӣҙж–°еҶ…е®№жҸҗдҫӣеҷЁе·Іжңүзҡ„ж•°жҚ®гҖӮдҪҝз”ЁuriеҸӮж•°жқҘзЎ®е®ҡжӣҙж–°е“ӘдёҖеј иЎЁдёӯзҡ„ж•°жҚ®пјҢж–°ж•°жҚ®дҝқеӯҳеңЁvaluesеҸӮж•°дёӯпјҢselectionе’ҢselectionArgsеҸӮж•°з”ЁдәҺзәҰжқҹжӣҙж–°е“ӘдәӣиЎҢпјҢеҸ—еҪұе“Қзҡ„иЎҢж•°е°ҶдҪңдёәиҝ”еӣһеҖјиҝ”еӣһгҖӮ deleteпјҲпјүпјҡд»ҺеҶ…е®№жҸҗдҫӣеҷЁдёӯеҲ йҷӨж•°жҚ®гҖӮдҪҝз”ЁuriеҸӮж•°жқҘзЎ®е®ҡеҲ йҷӨе“ӘдёҖеј иЎЁдёӯзҡ„ж•°жҚ®пјҢselectionе’ҢselectionArgsеҸӮж•°з”ЁдәҺзәҰжқҹеҲ йҷӨе“ӘдәӣиЎҢпјҢиў«еҲ йҷӨзҡ„иЎҢж•°е°ҶдҪңдёәиҝ”еӣһеҖјиҝ”еӣһгҖӮ getTypeпјҲпјүпјҡж №жҚ®дј е…Ҙзҡ„еҶ…е®№URIжқҘиҝ”еӣһзӣёеә”зҡ„MIMEзұ»еһӢгҖӮ URIеҶҷжі•пјҡ content://com.example.app.provider/table1 иЎЁзӨәи®ҝй—®com.example.appиҝҷдёӘеә”з”Ёtable1иЎЁдёӯзҡ„ж•°жҚ®гҖӮжӯӨеӨ–пјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘеңЁиҝҷдёӘURIзҡ„еҗҺйқўеҠ дёҠдёҖдёӘidпјҡ content://com.example.app.provider/table1/1 иҝҷе°ұиЎЁзӨәжҹҘиҜўtable1иЎЁдёӯidдёә1зҡ„ж•°жҚ® жӯӨеӨ–жҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘдҪҝз”ЁйҖҡй…Қз¬Ұзҡ„ж–№ејҸжқҘеҲҶеҲ«еҢ№й…ҚиҝҷдёӨз§Қж јејҸеҶ…е®№зҡ„URIпјҡ * пјҡиЎЁзӨәеҢ№й…Қд»»ж„Ҹй•ҝеәҰзҡ„д»»ж„Ҹеӯ—з¬Ұ # пјҡиЎЁзӨәеҢ№й…Қд»»ж„Ҹй•ҝеәҰзҡ„ж•°еӯ— жүҖд»ҘпјҢдёҖдёӘиғҪеӨҹеҢ№й…Қд»»ж„ҸиЎЁзҡ„еҶ…е®№URIж јејҸе°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҶҷжҲҗпјҡ content://com.example.app.provider/* иҖҢдёҖдёӘиғҪеӨҹеҢ№й…Қд»»ж„ҸдёҖиЎҢж•°жҚ®зҡ„еҶ…е®№URIж јејҸе°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҶҷжҲҗпјҡ content://com.example.app.provider/table1/# жҺҘзқҖпјҢеҖҹеҠ©UriMatcherиҝҷдёӘзұ»еҸҜд»Ҙе®һзҺ°еҢ№й…ҚеҶ…е®№URIзҡ„еҠҹиғҪгҖӮUriMatcherдёӯжҸҗдҫӣдәҶдёҖдёӘaddURI()ж–№жі•пјҢиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•жҺҘж”¶дёүдёӘеҸӮж•°пјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҲҶеҲ«жҠҠauthorityгҖҒpathе’ҢдёҖдёӘиҮӘе®ҡд№үд»Јз Ғдј иҝӣеҺ»гҖӮиҝҷж ·пјҢеҪ“и°ғз”ЁUriMatcherзҡ„match()ж–№жі•ж—¶пјҢе°ұеҸҜд»Ҙе°ҶдёҖдёӘUriеҜ№иұЎдј е…ҘпјҢиҝ”еӣһеҖјжҳҜжҹҗдёӘиғҪеӨҹеҢ№й…ҚиҝҷдёӘUriеҜ№иұЎжүҖеҜ№еә”зҡ„иҮӘе®ҡд№үд»Јз ҒпјҢеҲ©з”ЁиҝҷдёӘд»Јз ҒпјҢжҲ‘д»¬е°ұеҸҜд»ҘеҲӨж–ӯеҮәи°ғз”Ёж–№жңҹжңӣзҡ„жҳҜйӮЈеј иЎЁдёӯзҡ„ж•°жҚ®дәҶгҖӮ eg:  class MyContentProvider extends ContentProvider { public static final int BOOK_DIR = 0; //иЎЁдёӯжүҖжңүж•°жҚ® public static final int BOOK_ITEM = 1; //иЎЁдёӯеҚ•жқЎж•°жҚ® public static final int CATEGORY_DIR = 2; public static final int CATEGORY_ITEM = 3; public static final String AUTHORITY = "com.example.ypp0623.decorator.provider"; public static UriMatcher uriMatcher; private MyDataBaseHelper dbHelper; static { uriMatcher = new UriMatcher(UriMatcher.NO_MATCH); uriMatcher.addURI(AUTHORITY, "book", BOOK_DIR); uriMatcher.addURI(AUTHORITY, "book/#", BOOK_ITEM); uriMatcher.addURI(AUTHORITY, "category", CATEGORY_DIR); uriMatcher.addURI(AUTHORITY, "catagory/#", CATEGORY_ITEM); } @Override public int delete(@NonNull Uri uri, String selection, String[] selectionArgs) { SQLiteDatabase db = dbHelper.getWritableDatabase(); int deletedRows = 0; switch (uriMatcher.match(uri)) { case BOOK_DIR: deletedRows = db.delete("Book", selection, selectionArgs); break; case BOOK_ITEM: String bookId = uri.getPathSegments().get(1); deletedRows = db.delete("Book", "id = ?", new String[]{bookId}); break; case CATEGORY_DIR: deletedRows = db.delete("Category", selection, selectionArgs); break; case CATEGORY_ITEM: String categoryId = uri.getPathSegments().get(1); deletedRows = db.delete("Category", "id = ?", new String[]{categoryId}); break; default: break; } return deletedRows; } @Override public String getType(@NonNull Uri uri) { switch (uriMatcher.match(uri)) { case BOOK_DIR: return "vnd.android.cursor.dir/vnd.com.example.ypp0623.decorator.provider.book"; case BOOK_ITEM: return "vnd.android.cursor.item/vnd.com.example.ypp0623.decorator.provider.book"; case CATEGORY_DIR: return "vnd.android.cursor.dir/vnd.com.example.ypp0623.decorator.provider.category"; case CATEGORY_ITEM: return "vnd.android.cursor.item/vnd.com.example.ypp0623.decorator.provider.category"; } return null; } @Override public Uri insert(@NonNull Uri uri, ContentValues values) { SQLiteDatabase db = dbHelper.getWritableDatabase(); Uri uriReturn = null; switch (uriMatcher.match(uri)) { case BOOK_DIR: case BOOK_ITEM: long newBookId = db.insert("Book", null, values); uriReturn = Uri.parse("content://" + AUTHORITY + "/book/" + newBookId); break; case CATEGORY_DIR: case CATEGORY_ITEM: long newCategoryId = db.insert("Category", null, values); uriReturn = Uri.parse("content://" + AUTHORITY + "/catrgory/" + newCategoryId); break; default: break; } return uriReturn; } @Override public boolean onCreate() { dbHelper = new MyDataBaseHelper(getContext(), "BookStore.db", null, 1); return true; } @Override public Cursor query(@NonNull Uri uri, String[] projection, String selection, String[] selectionArgs, String sortOrder) { SQLiteDatabase db = dbHelper.getReadableDatabase(); Cursor cursor = null; switch (uriMatcher.match(uri)) { case BOOK_DIR: cursor = db.query("Book", projection, selection, selectionArgs, null, null, sortOrder); break; case BOOK_ITEM: String bookId = uri.getPathSegments().get(1); cursor = db.query("Book", projection, "id = ?", new String[]{bookId}, null, null, sortOrder); break; case CATEGORY_DIR: cursor = db.query("Category", projection, selection, selectionArgs, null, null, sortOrder); break; case CATEGORY_ITEM: String categoryId = uri.getPathSegments().get(1); cursor = db.query("Category", projection, "id = ?", new String[]{categoryId}, null, null, sortOrder); break; default: break; } return cursor; } @Override public int update(@NonNull Uri uri, ContentValues values, String selection, String[] selectionArgs) { SQLiteDatabase db = dbHelper.getWritableDatabase(); int updateRows = 0; switch (uriMatcher.match(uri)) { case BOOK_DIR: updateRows = db.update("Book", values, selection, selectionArgs); break; case BOOK_ITEM: String bookId = uri.getPathSegments().get(1); updateRows = db.update("Book", values, "id = пјҹ", new String[]{bookId}); break; case CATEGORY_DIR: updateRows = db.update("Category", values, selection, selectionArgs); break; case CATEGORY_ITEM: String categoryId = uri.getPathSegments().get(1); updateRows = db.update("Category", values, "id = ?", new String[]{categoryId}); break; default: break; } return updateRows; }} MyDataBaseHelperеҰӮдёӢжүҖзӨәпјҡ integer primary key autoinCrement," +"author text," +"price real," +"pages integer," +"name text)"; public static final String CREATE_CATEGORY = "create table Category(" +"id integer primary key autoincrement," +"catrgory_name text," +"category_code integer)"; public MyDataBaseHelper(Context context, String name, SQLiteDatabase.CursorFactory factory, int version) { super(context, name, factory, version); mContext = context; } @Override public void onCreate(SQLiteDatabase db) { db.execSQL(CREATE_BOOK); db.execSQL(CREATE_CATEGORY); } @Override public void onUpgrade(SQLiteDatabase db, int oldVersion, int newVersion) { }} еңЁManifestдёӯжіЁеҶҢпјҡ 123456<provider android:authorities="com.example.ypp0623.decorator" android:name=".MyContentProvider" android:enabled="true" android:exported="true"></provider> е…·дҪ“дҪҝз”ЁеҰӮдёӢпјҡ 12345678Uri uri1 = Uri.parse("content://com.example.ypp0623.decorator.MyContentProvider/book");Cursor cursor1 = getContentResolver().query(uri1,null,null,null,null);if (cursor1!=null){ while (cursor1.moveToNext()){ String name = cursor1.getString(cursor1.getColumnIndex("name")); String author = cursor1.getString(cursor1.getColumnIndex("author")); }}

posts.title: appеҶ·зғӯеҗҜеҠЁеҸҠдјҳеҢ–
posts.text: еҶ·еҗҜеҠЁпјҡеҪ“еҗҜеҠЁеә”з”Ёж—¶пјҢеҗҺеҸ°жІЎжңүиҜҘеә”з”Ёзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢпјҢиҝҷж—¶зі»з»ҹдјҡйҮҚж–°еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„иҝӣзЁӢеҲҶй…Қз»ҷиҜҘеә”з”ЁпјҢиҝҷдёӘеҗҜеҠЁж–№ејҸе°ұжҳҜеҶ·еҗҜеҠЁгҖӮ зү№зӮ№пјҡеҶ·еҗҜеҠЁеӣ дёәзі»з»ҹдјҡйҮҚж–°еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„иҝӣзЁӢеҲҶй…Қз»ҷе®ғпјҢжүҖд»Ҙдјҡе…ҲеҲӣе»әе’ҢеҲқе§ӢеҢ–Applicationзұ»пјҢеҶҚеҲӣе»әе’ҢеҲқе§ӢеҢ–MainActivityзұ»пјҲеҢ…жӢ¬дёҖзі»еҲ—зҡ„жөӢйҮҸгҖҒеёғеұҖгҖҒз»ҳеҲ¶пјүпјҢжңҖеҗҺжҳҫзӨәеңЁз•ҢйқўдёҠгҖӮ зғӯеҗҜеҠЁпјҡеҪ“еҗҜеҠЁеә”з”Ёж—¶пјҢеҗҺеҸ°е·ІжңүиҜҘеә”з”Ёзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢпјҲдҫӢпјҡжҢүbackй”®гҖҒhomeй”®пјҢеә”з”ЁиҷҪз„¶дјҡйҖҖеҮәпјҢдҪҶжҳҜиҜҘеә”з”Ёзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢжҳҜдҫқз„¶дјҡдҝқз•ҷеңЁеҗҺеҸ°пјҢеҸҜиҝӣе…Ҙд»»еҠЎеҲ—иЎЁжҹҘзңӢпјүпјҢжүҖд»ҘеңЁе·ІжңүиҝӣзЁӢзҡ„жғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢиҝҷз§ҚеҗҜеҠЁдјҡд»Һе·Іжңүзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢдёӯжқҘеҗҜеҠЁеә”з”ЁпјҢиҝҷдёӘж–№ејҸеҸ«зғӯеҗҜеҠЁгҖӮ зү№зӮ№пјҡзғӯеҗҜеҠЁеӣ дёәдјҡд»Һе·Іжңүзҡ„иҝӣзЁӢдёӯжқҘеҗҜеҠЁпјҢжүҖд»ҘзғӯеҗҜеҠЁе°ұдёҚдјҡиө°ApplicationиҝҷжӯҘдәҶпјҢиҖҢжҳҜзӣҙжҺҘиө°MainActivityпјҲеҢ…жӢ¬дёҖзі»еҲ—зҡ„жөӢйҮҸгҖҒеёғеұҖгҖҒз»ҳеҲ¶пјүпјҢжүҖд»ҘзғӯеҗҜеҠЁзҡ„иҝҮзЁӢеҸӘйңҖиҰҒеҲӣе»әе’ҢеҲқе§ӢеҢ–дёҖдёӘMainActivityе°ұиЎҢдәҶпјҢиҖҢдёҚеҝ…еҲӣе»әе’ҢеҲқе§ӢеҢ–ApplicationпјҢеӣ дёәдёҖдёӘеә”з”Ёд»Һж–°иҝӣзЁӢзҡ„еҲӣе»әеҲ°иҝӣзЁӢзҡ„й”ҖжҜҒпјҢApplicationеҸӘдјҡеҲқе§ӢеҢ–дёҖж¬ЎгҖӮ posts.title: IntentFilterзҡ„еҢ№й…Қи§„еҲҷ
posts.text: IntentFilterдёӯзҡ„иҝҮж»ӨдҝЎжҒҜжңүactionгҖҒcategoryгҖҒdataпјҢдёҖдёӘиҝҮж»ӨеҲ—иЎЁдёӯзҡ„actionгҖҒcategoryгҖҒdataеҸҜд»ҘжңүеӨҡдёӘпјҢеҸӘжңүдёҖдёӘIntentеҗҢж—¶еҢ№й…Қactionзұ»еҲ«гҖҒcategoryзұ»еҲ«гҖҒdataзұ»еҲ«жүҚз®—е®Ңе…ЁеҢ№й…ҚпјҢеҸӘжңүе®Ңе…ЁеҢ№й…ҚжүҚиғҪжҲҗеҠҹеҗҜеҠЁзӣ®ж ҮActivityгҖӮжӯӨеӨ–пјҢдёҖдёӘActivityеҸҜд»ҘжңүеӨҡдёӘintent-filterпјҢдёҖдёӘIntentеҸӘиҰҒиғҪеҢ№й…Қд»»дҪ•дёҖз»„intent-filterеҚіеҸҜжҲҗеҠҹеҗҜеҠЁеҜ№еә”зҡ„ActivityгҖӮ 1.actionеҢ№й…Қи§„еҲҷпјҡactionеҢ№й…Қи§„еҲҷжҳҜIntentдёӯactionеҝ…йЎ»иғҪеӨҹе’ҢиҝҮж»Өи§„еҲҷдёӯзҡ„actionеҢ№й…ҚпјҢиҝҷйҮҢзҡ„еҢ№й…ҚжҳҜжҢҮactionзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІеҖје®Ңе…ЁдёҖж ·гҖӮдёҖдёӘиҝҮж»Өи§„еҲҷдёӯеҸҜд»ҘжңүеӨҡдёӘactionпјҢеҸӘиҰҒIntentдёӯзҡ„actionиғҪеӨҹе’ҢиҝҮж»Өи§„еҲҷдёӯзҡ„д»»дҪ•дёҖдёӘactionзӣёеҗҢеҚіеҸҜеҢ№й…ҚжҲҗеҠҹпјҢжӯӨеӨ–пјҢactionеҢәеҲҶеӨ§е°ҸеҶҷгҖӮ 2.catrgoryеҢ№й…Қи§„еҲҷпјҡе’ҢactionжңүеҢәеҲ«зҡ„жҳҜIntentжІЎжңүcategoryд№ҹиғҪеҢ№й…ҚжҲҗеҠҹпјҢзі»з»ҹеңЁstartActivityе’ҢstartActivityForResultжҳҜеҗҰдјҡй»ҳи®ӨеҠ дёҠвҖңandroid.intent.category.DEFAULTвҖқиҝҷдёӘcategoryгҖӮдҪҶжҳҜдёҖж—ҰIntentдёӯжңүcategoryпјҢдёҚз®ЎжңүеҮ дёӘпјҢдёҖе®ҡиҰҒе’ҢиҝҮж»Өи§„еҲҷдёӯзҡ„д»»дҪ•дёҖдёӘcategoryзӣёеҗҢгҖӮжӯӨеӨ–пјҢдёәдәҶactivityиғҪеӨҹжҺҘеҸ—йҡҗејҸи°ғз”ЁпјҢе°ұеҝ…йЎ»еңЁintent-filterдёӯжҢҮе®ҡвҖқandroid.intent.category.DEFAULTвҖқиҝҷдёӘcatogoryгҖӮ 3.dataеҢ№й…Қи§„еҲҷпјҡе’Ңactionзұ»дјјпјҢеҰӮжһңиҝҮж»Өи§„еҲҷдёӯе®ҡд№үдәҶdataпјҢйӮЈд№ҲIntentдёӯеҝ…йЎ»д№ҹиҰҒе®ҡд№үеҸҜеҢ№й…Қзҡ„dataгҖӮ dataзҡ„з»“жһ„пјҡdataз”ұдёӨйғЁеҲҶжһ„жҲҗпјҢmimeTypeе’ҢURIгҖӮmimeTypeжҢҮеӘ’дҪ“зұ»еһӢпјҢжҜ”еҰӮimage/jpegгҖҒaudio/mpeg4-genericе’Ңvideo/*зӯүпјҢеҸҜд»ҘиЎЁзӨәеӣҫзүҮгҖҒж–Үжң¬гҖҒи§Ҷйў‘зӯүдёҚеҗҢзҡ„еӘ’дҪ“ж јејҸгҖӮ Scheme:URIзҡ„жЁЎејҸпјҢжҜ”еҰӮhttpгҖҒfileгҖҒcontentзӯүпјҢеҰӮжһңURIдёӯжІЎжңүжҢҮе®ҡscheme,йӮЈд№Ҳж•ҙдёӘURIзҡ„е…¶д»–еҸӮж•°ж— ж•ҲпјҢиҝҷд№ҹж„Ҹе‘ізқҖURIжҳҜж— ж•Ҳзҡ„гҖӮ HostпјҡURIзҡ„дё»жңәеҗҚпјҢжҜ”еҰӮwww.baidu.comпјҢеҰӮжһңhostжңӘжҢҮе®ҡпјҢйӮЈд№Ҳж•ҙдёӘURIдёӯзҡ„е…¶д»–еҸӮж•°ж— ж•ҲпјҢиҝҷд№ҹж„Ҹе‘ізқҖURIжҳҜж— ж•Ҳзҡ„гҖӮ PortпјҡURIдёӯзҡ„з«ҜеҸЈеҸ·пјҢжҜ”еҰӮ80пјҢд»…еҪ“URIдёӯжҢҮе®ҡдәҶschemeе’ҢhostеҸӮж•°зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷportеҸӮж•°жүҚжҳҜжңүж„Ҹд№үзҡ„гҖӮ PathгҖҒpathPatternе’ҢpathPrefixпјҡиҝҷдёүдёӘеҸӮж•°иЎЁиҝ°и·Ҝеҫ„дҝЎжҒҜпјҢе…¶дёӯpathиЎЁзӨәе®Ңж•ҙзҡ„и·Ҝеҫ„дҝЎжҒҜпјҢдҪҶжҳҜе®ғйҮҢйқўеҸҜд»ҘеҢ…еҗ«йҖҡй…Қз¬ҰвҖңвҖқпјҢвҖңвҖқиЎЁзӨә0дёӘжҲ–еӨҡдёӘд»»ж„Ҹеӯ—з¬ҰпјҢйңҖиҰҒжіЁж„Ҹзҡ„жҳҜпјҢз”ұдәҺжӯЈеҲҷиЎЁиҫҫејҸзҡ„и§„иҢғпјҢеҰӮжһңжғіиЎЁзӨәзңҹе®һзҡ„еӯ—з¬ҰдёІпјҢйӮЈд№ҲвҖңвҖқиҰҒеҶҷжҲҗвҖң\вҖқ,вҖқ\вҖқиҰҒеҶҷжҲҗвҖң\\\вҖқ;pathPrefixиЎЁзӨәи·Ҝеҫ„зҡ„еүҚзјҖдҝЎжҒҜгҖӮ dataзҡ„еҢ№й…Қи§„еҲҷе’Ңactionзұ»дјјпјҢ е®ғд№ҹиҰҒжұӮIntentеҝ…йЎ»еҗ«жңүdataж•°жҚ®пјҢе№¶дё”dataж•°жҚ®иғҪеӨҹе®Ңе…ЁеҢ№й…ҚиҝҮж»Өи§„еҲҷдёӯзҡ„жҹҗдёҖдёӘdataгҖӮ

posts.title: activityеҗҜеҠЁжЁЎејҸе’Ңintent filter
posts.text: Activityзҡ„еҗҜеҠЁжЁЎејҸпјҡ 1.standard : ж ҮеҮҶжЁЎејҸпјҢжҜҸж¬Ўжү“ејҖйғҪдјҡж–°е»әдёҖдёӘе®һдҫӢпјҢиҖҢдё”дјҡеӨ„дәҺеҗҜеҠЁеҪ“еүҚactivityзҡ„activityзҡ„д»»еҠЎж Ҳдёӯ 2.singleTop : ж ҲйЎ¶еӨҚз”ЁжЁЎејҸпјҢеңЁиҝҷз§ҚжЁЎејҸдёӢпјҢеҰӮжһңж–°зҡ„activityе·Із»ҸдҪҚдәҺд»»еҠЎж Ҳзҡ„ж ҲйЎ¶пјҢйӮЈд№ҲжӯӨactivityдёҚдјҡиў«еҲӣе»әпјҢеҗҢж—¶е®ғзҡ„onNewIntentдјҡиў«и°ғз”ЁпјҢжӯӨж—¶е®ғзҡ„з”ҹе‘Ҫе‘ЁжңҹдёҚдјҡиў«и°ғз”ЁгҖӮ 3.singleTask пјҡж ҲеҶ…еӨҚз”ЁжЁЎејҸпјҢиҝҷжҳҜдёҖз§ҚеҚ•е®һдҫӢжЁЎејҸпјҢеҸӘиҰҒactivityеңЁдёҖдёӘж ҲдёӯеӯҳеңЁпјҢйӮЈд№ҲеӨҡж¬ЎеҗҜеҠЁжӯӨactivityйғҪдёҚдјҡиў«йҮҚж–°еҲӣе»әпјҢе№¶дё”и°ғз”Ёе…¶onNewIntentгҖӮеҪ“дёҖдёӘactivityе…·жңүиҝҷз§ҚжЁЎејҸпјҢзі»з»ҹдјҡйҰ–е…ҲеҜ»жүҫеҪ“еүҚactivityжҳҜеҗҰеңЁеҪ“еүҚд»»еҠЎж ҲдёӯжҳҜеҗҰеӯҳеңЁеҪ“еүҚactivity зҡ„е®һдҫӢпјҢеҰӮжһңжІЎжңүеҲҷйҮҚж–°еҲӣе»ә 4.singleInstance : еҚ•е®һдҫӢжЁЎејҸгҖӮиҝҷжҳҜдёҖз§ҚеҠ ејәзҡ„singleTaskжЁЎејҸпјҢе®ғйҷӨдәҶе…·жңүsingleTaskжЁЎејҸзҡ„жүҖжңүзү№жҖ§д№ӢеӨ–пјҢиҝҳеҠ ејәдәҶдёҖзӮ№пјҢйӮЈе°ұжҳҜе…·жңүжӯӨз§ҚжЁЎејҸзҡ„activityеҸӘиғҪеҚ•зӢ¬зҡ„дҪҚдәҺдёҖдёӘд»»еҠЎж ҲдёӯпјҢжҚўеҸҘиҜқиҜҙпјҢжҜ”еҰӮActivity A жҳҜsingleInstanceжЁЎејҸпјҢеҪ“AеҗҜеҠЁеҗҺпјҢзі»з»ҹдјҡдёәе®ғеҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„д»»еҠЎж ҲпјҢз„¶еҗҺAзӢ¬иҮӘеңЁиҝҷдёӘж–°зҡ„д»»еҠЎж ҲдёӯпјҢз”ұдәҺж ҲеҶ…зҡ„еӨҚз”ЁжҖ§пјҢеҗҺз»ӯзҡ„иҜ·жұӮеқҮдёҚдјҡеҲӣе»әж–°зҡ„ActivityпјҢйҷӨйқһиҝҷдёӘзӢ¬зү№зҡ„д»»еҠЎж Ҳиў«зі»з»ҹй”ҖжҜҒдәҶгҖӮ жӯӨеӨ–пјҢеҜ№дәҺsingleTaskжЁЎејҸзҡ„ActivityпјҢиҝҳеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮTaskAffinityжқҘжҢҮе®ҡActivityеҗҜеҠЁжүҖеңЁзҡ„д»»еҠЎж Ҳзҡ„еҗҚеӯ—пјҢжңӘжҢҮе®ҡжғ…еҶөдёӢдјҡеҮәзҺ°еңЁе’ҢеҢ…еҗҚзӣёеҗҢзҡ„д»»еҠЎж ҲдёӯгҖӮ еҸҜйҖҡиҝҮдёҖдёӢдёӨз§Қж–№ејҸжқҘжҢҮе®ҡactivity зҡ„еҗҜеҠЁжЁЎејҸпјҡ 1.<activity android:name=".Main2Activity" android:launchMode="singleTop"> 2.Intent intent = new Intent(this,Main2Activity.class);intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK);startActivity(intent); жӯӨеӨ–еўһеҠ FLAG_ACTIVITY_EXCLUDE_FROM_RECENTSиҝҷдёӘж Үи®°зҡ„ActivityдёҚдјҡеҮәзҺ°еңЁеҺҶеҸІзҡ„Activityзҡ„еҲ—иЎЁдёӯпјҢзӯүеҗҢдәҺеңЁXMLдёӯжҢҮе®ҡActivityзҡ„еұһжҖ§android:excludeFromRecents=вҖқtrueвҖқгҖӮ

posts.text: (1) onCreate : иЎЁзӨәactivity иЎЁзӨәacticityжӯЈеңЁйҮҚж–°еҗҜеҠЁгҖӮдёҖиҲ¬жғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢеҪ“еҪ“еүҚactivityд»ҺдёҚеҸҜи§ҒйҮҚж–°еҸҳдёәеҸҜи§ҒзҠ¶жҖҒж—¶пјҢonRestartе°ұдјҡиў«и°ғз”ЁгҖӮиҝҷз§Қжғ…еҪўдёҖиҲ¬жҳҜз”ЁжҲ·иЎҢдёәеҜјиҮҙзҡ„пјҢжҜ”еҰӮз”ЁжҲ·жҢүHomeеҲҮжҚўеҲ°жЎҢйқўжҲ–иҖ…з”ЁжҲ·жү“ејҖдәҶдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„activityпјҢиҝҷжҳҜеҪ“еүҚзҡ„activityе°ұдјҡжҡӮеҒңпјҢд№ҹе°ұжҳҜonPauseе’ҢonStopиў«жү§иЎҢдәҶпјҢжҺҘзқҖз”ЁжҲ·еҸҲеӣһеҲ°дәҶиҝҷдёӘactivityпјҢе°ұдјҡеҮәзҺ°иҝҷз§Қжғ…еҶөгҖӮ (3) onStart : иЎЁзӨәactivityжӯЈеңЁиў«еҗҜеҠЁпјҢеҚіе°ҶејҖе§ӢпјҢиҝҷжҳҜactivityе·Із»ҸеҸҜи§ҒдәҶпјҢдҪҶжҳҜиҝҳжІЎжңүеҮәзҺ°еңЁеүҚеҸ°пјҢиҝҳж— жі•е’Ңз”ЁжҲ·дәӨдә’гҖӮиҝҷдёӘж—¶еҖҷе…¶е®һеҸҜд»ҘзҗҶи§Јдёәactivityе·Із»ҸжҳҫзӨәеҮәжқҘдәҶпјҢдҪҶжҳҜжҲ‘д»¬иҝҳзңӢдёҚеҲ°гҖӮ (4) onResume : иЎЁзӨәactivityе·Із»ҸеҸҜи§ҒдәҶпјҢе№¶дё”еҮәзҺ°еңЁеүҚеҸ°з—…ејҖе§Ӣжҙ»еҠЁгҖӮиҰҒжіЁж„ҸиҝҷдёӘе’ҢonStartзҡ„еҜ№жҜ”пјҢonStartе’ҢonResumeйғҪиЎЁзӨәactivityе·Із»ҸеҸҜи§ҒпјҢдҪҶжҳҜonStartзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷactivityиҝҳеңЁеҗҺеҸ°пјҢonResumeзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷactivityжүҚжҳҫзӨәеҲ°еүҚеҸ°гҖӮ (5) onPause : иЎЁзӨәactivityжӯЈеңЁеҒңжӯўпјҢжӯЈеёёжғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢзҙ§жҺҘзқҖonStopе°ұдјҡиў«и°ғз”ЁгҖӮеңЁзү№ж®Ҡжғ…еҶөдёӢпјҢеҰӮжһңиҝҷдёӘж—¶еҖҷеҝ«йҖҹеҶҚеӣһеҲ°еҪ“еүҚзҡ„activityпјҢйӮЈд№ҲonResumeе°ұдјҡиў«и°ғз”ЁгҖӮеңЁжӯӨж—¶з”ЁжҲ·еҸҜд»ҘдёҖдәӣж•°жҚ®еӯҳеӮЁгҖҒеҒңжӯўеҠЁз”»зҡ„ж“ҚдҪңпјҢдҪҶжҳҜжіЁж„ҸдёҚиғҪеӨӘиҖ—ж—¶пјҢеӣ дёәиҝҷдјҡеҪұе“ҚеҲ°ж–°activityзҡ„жҳҫзӨәпјҢonPauseеҝ…йЎ»е…Ҳжү§иЎҢе®ҢпјҢж–°activityзҡ„onResumeжүҚдјҡжү§иЎҢгҖӮ (6) onStop : иЎЁзӨәactivityеҚіе°ҶеҒңжӯўпјҢеҸҜд»ҘеҒҡдёҖдәӣзЁҚеҫ®йҮҚйҮҸзә§зҡ„еӣһж”¶е·ҘдҪңпјҢеҗҢж ·дёҚиғҪеӨӘиҖ—ж—¶гҖӮ (7) onDestroy : иЎЁзӨәactivityеҚіе°Ҷиў«й”ҖжҜҒпјҢиҝҷжҳҜactivityз”ҹе‘Ҫе‘Ёжңҹдёӯзҡ„жңҖеҗҺдёҖдёӘеӣһи°ғпјҢеңЁиҝҷйҮҢпјҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘеҒҡдёҖдәӣеӣһж”¶е·ҘдҪңе’ҢжңҖз»Ҳзҡ„иө„жәҗйҮҠж”ҫгҖӮ еёёи§Ғactivityз”ҹе‘Ҫе‘Ёжңҹзҡ„еҮ з§Қжғ…еҶөпјҡ (1) activityжӯЈеёёеҗҜеҠЁж—¶пјҢonCreate -> onStart -> onResume (2) жү“ејҖж–°зҡ„activityжҲ–иҖ…еҲҮжҚўеҲ°жЎҢйқўж—¶пјҡonPause -> onStopпјҢеңЁиҝҷйҮҢеҪ“activityйҮҮз”ЁйҖҸжҳҺдё»йўҳж—¶жҜ”иҫғзү№ж®ҠпјҢдёҚдјҡеӣһи°ғonStop (3) еҪ“еңЁдёҠйқўжғ…еҶөеҶҚиҝ”еӣһеҪ“еүҚactivityж—¶пјҢonRestart -> onStart -> onResume (4) backй”®иҝ”еӣһж—¶ onPasue -> onStop -> onDestroy

posts.title: и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…жЁЎејҸ
posts.text: йҰ–е…ҲпјҢе®һзҺ°и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…гҖҒиў«и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…жҺҘеҸЈ 123456789101112public interface Subject { void registerObserver(Observer o); //жіЁеҶҢи§ӮеҜҹиҖ… void removeObserver(Observer o); //еҲ йҷӨи§ӮеҜҹиҖ… void notifyObservers(); //еҪ“иў«и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…зҠ¶жҖҒж”№еҸҳж—¶пјҢйҖҡзҹҘжүҖжңүи§ӮеҜҹиҖ…дҝЎжҒҜ}public interface Observer { //еҪ“иў«и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…зҡ„ж•°жҚ®жӣҙж–°ж—¶пјҢе°Ҷжӣҙж–°зҡ„дҝЎжҒҜеҪ“еҒҡеҸӮж•°дј йҖ’з»ҷи§ӮеҜҹиҖ… void update(float temperature, float humidity, float pressure);}public interface DisplayElement { void display(); //з”ЁдәҺжҳҫзӨәжӣҙж–°зҡ„ж•°жҚ®} иў«и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…еҜ№иұЎзҡ„е®һзҺ° 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142//иў«и§ӮеҜҹеҜ№иұЎе®һзҺ°иў«и§ӮеҜҹжҺҘеҸЈpublic class WeatherData implements Subject { private ArrayList<Observer> observers; private float temperature; private float humidity; private float pressure; public WeatherData() { observers = new ArrayList<Observer>(); } @Override public void registerObserver(Observer o) { observers.add(o); } @Override public void removeObserver(Observer o) { int i = observers.indexOf(o); if (i >= 0) { observers.remove(i); } } public void notifyObservers() { for (int i = 0; i < observers.size(); i++) { Observer observer = observers.get(i); observer.update(temperature, humidity, pressure); } } public void measurementsChanged(){ notifyObservers(); } public void setMeasurements(float temperature,float humidity,float pressure){ this.temperature = temperature; this.humidity = humidity; this.pressure = pressure; measurementsChanged(); }} и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…иў«и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…йҖ»иҫ‘зҡ„е…·дҪ“е®һзҺ° 123456789101112131415161718192021222324//и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…е®һзҺ°и§ӮеҜҹиҖ…жҺҘеҸЈе’Ңе…·дҪ“зҡ„ж•°жҚ®еұ•зӨәpublic class CurrentContionsDisplay implements Observer, DisplayElement { private static final String TAG = "CurrentContionsDisplay"; private float temperature; private float humidity; private Subject weatherData; public CurrentContionsDisplay(Subject weatherData) { this.weatherData = weatherData; weatherData.registerObserver(this); } @Override public void update(float temperature, float humidity, float pressure) { this.temperature = temperature; this.humidity = humidity; display(); } @Override public void display() { Log.d(TAG, "display: " + temperature + "::" + humidity); }} дҪҝз”Ёе®һдҫӢпјҡ 123WeatherData data = new WeatherData();CurrentContionsDisplay display = new CurrentContionsDisplay(data);data.setMeasurements(100,100,100); д»Јз Ғең°еқҖ

posts.title: androidжҖ§иғҪдјҳеҢ–
posts.text: 1.дјҳеҢ–еёғеұҖ пјҲ1пјүеҮҸе°‘еёғеұҖеөҢеҘ—пјҢVIewж ‘зҡ„й«ҳеәҰдёҚи¶…иҝҮ10еұӮпјҢдҪҝз”ЁRelativeLayoutеҸҜд»ҘжҸҗй«ҳжёІжҹ“зҡ„ж•ҲзҺҮ пјҲ2пјүдҪҝз”Ёж ҮзӯҫйҮҚз”ЁеёғеұҖ пјҲ3пјүдҪҝз”ЁViewStubе»¶иҝҹеҠ иҪҪ пјҲ4пјүgithubејҖжәҗе·Ҙе…·жЈҖжөӢеёғеұҖ 2.еҶ…еӯҳдјҳеҢ– иҺ·еҸ–еә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸжңҖеӨ§еҶ…еӯҳ//128MB int maxMemory=(int)(Runtime.getRuntime().maxMemory()/1024); иҺ·еҸ–жүӢжңәе ҶеҶ…еӯҳеӨ§е°Ҹ MB int memClass=((ActivityManager)getSystemService(Context.ACTIVITY_SERVICE)).getMemoryClass(); int maxMemory=(int)(Runtime.getRuntime().maxMemory()/1024);//еҫ—еҲ°еә”з”ЁзЁӢеәҸжңҖеӨ§еҶ…еӯҳзҡ„kbеӨ§е°Ҹ Log.d(TAG, maxMemory+вҖқвҖқ); int memClass=((ActivityManager)getSystemService(Context.ACTIVITY_SERVICE)).getMemoryClass();//еҫ—еҲ°жүӢжңәжңҖеӨ§е ҶеҶ…еӯҳзҡ„еӨ§е°ҸпјҢjava heapжңҖеӨ§еҖј Log.d(TAG, memClass+вҖқвҖқ); Runtime runtime=Runtime.getRuntime(); //еӯ—иҠӮеӨ§е°Ҹ long maxHeap=runtime.maxMemory();//жңҖеӨ§java heapжңҖеӨ§еҖј Log.d(TAG, вҖңmaxMemoryвҖқ+maxHeap+вҖқвҖқ); long freeMemory=runtime.freeMemory();//иҺ·еҸ–з”іиҜ·дҪҶжңӘдҪҝз”Ёjava heap,еҚ•дҪҚbyte Log.d(TAG, вҖңfreeMemoryвҖқ+freeMemory); long usedMemory=runtime.totalMemory();//иҺ·еҸ–е·Із»Ҹз”іиҜ·зҡ„е…ЁйғЁеҶ…еӯҳ Log.d(TAG, вҖңtotalMemoryвҖқ+usedMemory); long haveusedMemory=runtime.totalMemory()-runtime.freeMemory();//е·Із»ҸдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„heapеҶ…еӯҳ Log.d(TAG, вҖңhaveusedMemoryвҖқ+haveusedMemory); long availableMemory=runtime.maxMemory()-runtime.totalMemory()+runtime.freeMemory();//еҪ“еүҚеҸҜnewеҮәжқҘзҡ„жңҖеӨ§еҶ…еӯҳ Log.d(TAG, вҖңavailableMemoryвҖқ+availableMemory); пјҲ1пјүе ҶеҶ…еӯҳпјҡе ҶеҶ…еӯҳз”ЁжқҘеӯҳж”ҫnewеҲӣе»әзҡ„еҜ№иұЎе’Ңж•°з»„пјҢз”ұиҷҡжӢҹжңәзҡ„еһғеңҫеӣһж”¶еҷЁGCз®ЎзҗҶгҖӮи°ғз”ЁSystem.gc()ж–№жі•еҸҜд»Ҙе»әи®®зі»з»ҹеӣһж”¶пјҢдҪҶжҳҜејҖеҸ‘иҖ…ж— жі•жҺ§еҲ¶гҖӮ пјҲ2пјүBitmapдјҳеҢ– еңЁBitmapеҜ№иұЎдҪҝз”Ёз»“жқҹж—¶еҸҠж—¶и°ғз”Ёbitmap.recycle()ж–№жі•йҮҠж”ҫиө„жәҗпјӣйҖҡиҝҮеҶ…еӯҳзј“еӯҳпјҲLruCacheпјүе’ҢзЈҒзӣҳзј“еӯҳпјҲDiskLruCacheпјүжӣҙеҘҪзҡ„дҪҝз”ЁпјҲжҺЁиҚҗдҪҝз”ЁGlideжЎҶжһ¶пјү пјҲ3пјүд»Јз ҒдјҳеҢ– еёёйҮҸдҪҝз”Ёstaticдҝ®йҘ°з¬Ұ staticж–№жі•еҸҜд»ҘжҸҗй«ҳи®ҝй—®йҖҹеәҰ е°ҪйҮҸдҪҝз”ЁеұҖйғЁеҸҳйҮҸд»ЈжӣҝжҲҗе‘ҳеҸҳйҮҸпјҲasиҮӘеёҰжҸҗйҶ’пјү еҮҸе°‘еҜ№иұЎзҡ„дҪҝз”ЁпјҢе°ҪйҮҸдҪҝз”ЁеҹәзЎҖзұ»еһӢ eg: Sting s; better than String s = new String();(иЈ…жӢҶз®ұ) дёҚдҪҝз”ЁжһҡдёҫпјҒпјҒпјҲеҫҲж¶ҲиҖ—еҶ…еӯҳпјү еҮҸе°‘дҪҝз”ЁIterator CursorгҖҒReceiverгҖҒSensorгҖҒFileзӯүеҶ…еӯҳеӨ§жҲ·зҡ„еҲӣе»әгҖҒеӣһж”¶гҖҒжіЁеҶҢе’Ңи§ЈжіЁеҶҢ йҒҝе…ҚдҪҝз”ЁIOCжіЁи§ЈпјҹпјҹпјҹпјҲеҫ…зҗҶи§Јпјү еҲ©з”ЁSurfaceViewд»ЈжӣҝViewжқҘиҝӣиЎҢз»ҳеӣҫж“ҚдҪң View inflateеҗҺеҸҠж—¶зј“еӯҳ дёҚз”ЁжҜҸж¬ЎйғҪеҺ»и§Јжһҗи§Ҷеӣҫ 3.Lintе·Ҙе…· 4.Android StudioиҮӘеёҰзҡ„Mrmory Monitorе·Ҙе…· 5.дҪҝз”ЁTraceViewе·Ҙе…·дјҳеҢ– 6.дҪҝз”ЁMATе·Ҙе…·еҲҶжһҗеә”з”ЁеҶ…еӯҳ 7.дҪҝз”ЁDumpsysеҲҶжһҗзі»з»ҹзҠ¶жҖҒ

posts.title: AysncTaskиҜҰи§Ј
posts.text: еңЁжҲ‘д»¬ејҖеҸ‘иҝҮзЁӢдёӯпјҢз»Ҹеёёдјҡз”ЁеҲ°ејӮжӯҘж“ҚдҪңжқҘиҝӣиЎҢз•Ңйқўзҡ„жӣҙж–°пјҢдёҖиҲ¬жқҘиҜҙпјҢеңЁеӯҗзәҝзЁӢжӣҙж–°UIзәҝзЁӢжңүдёүз§Қж–№ејҸпјҢе…·дҪ“еҸҜд»ҘзңӢпјҡhttps://blog.csdn.net/qq_29451649/article/details/79529441 дҪҶжҳҜжҲ‘д»¬еңЁеҶҷдёҖдәӣеӨҚжқӮзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңж—¶зӣҙжҺҘдҪҝз”ЁHandlerдјҡжңүзӮ№йә»зғҰпјҢдёӢйқўжҲ‘д»¬еӯҰд№ дёҖдёӢAsyncTaskзҡ„дҪҝз”Ёд»ҘеҸҠе®һзҺ°зҡ„еҺҹзҗҶеҗ§гҖӮ йҰ–е…ҲзңӢAsyncTaskзҡ„е®ҡд№үпјҢж–№жі•еҰӮдёӢпјҡ public abstract class AsyncTask<Params, Progress, Result> {вҖҰ еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°AsyncTaskжҳҜжіӣеһӢзұ»пјҢе®ғеҢ…еҗ«3дёӘеҸӮж•°пјҢе…¶дёӯParamsжҳҜеҸӮж•°зҡ„зұ»еһӢпјҢProgressеҗҺеҸ°д»»еҠЎжү§иЎҢзҡ„д»»еҠЎзұ»еһӢпјҢResultжҳҜиҝ”еӣһзҡ„з»“жһңзұ»еһӢгҖӮжҲ‘д»¬еңЁеҲӣе»ә AsyncTaskзҡ„ж—¶еҖҷеҗҺпјҢиҰҒжңүд»ҘдёӢеӣӣдёӘж ёеҝғзҡ„ж–№жі•пјҡ protected Object doInBackground(Object[] objects) { return null; } @Override protected void onPostExecute(Object o) { super.onPostExecute(o); } @Override protected void onProgressUpdate(Object[] values) { super.onProgressUpdate(values); } @Override protected void onPreExecute() { super.onPreExecute(); } е…¶дёӯйҷӨдәҶdoInBackgroundж–№жі•жҳҜеңЁеӯҗзәҝзЁӢдёӯиҝҗиЎҢзҡ„пјҢе…¶д»–зҡ„йғҪжҳҜеңЁдё»зәҝзЁӢдёӯжү§иЎҢзҡ„гҖӮonPreExecuteж–№жі•еҒҡзҡ„жҳҜеҲқе§ӢеҢ–зҡ„е·ҘдҪңпјҢеңЁд»»еҠЎжү§иЎҢеүҚжү§иЎҢгҖӮdoInBackgroundж–№жі•еңЁonPreExecuteж–№жі•д№ӢеҗҺд№ӢиЎҢпјҢдё»иҰҒз”ЁжқҘиҝӣиЎҢиҖ—ж—¶ж“ҚдҪңпјҢеңЁжҲ‘д»¬жү§иЎҢзҡ„иҝҮзЁӢдёӯеҸҜд»Ҙи°ғз”ЁpublishProgressж–№жі•пјҢе°ҶжҲ‘д»¬жү§иЎҢзҡ„иҝӣеәҰдј еҲ°дёӢдёҖдёӘж–№жі•onProgressUpdateдёӯпјҲдҫӢеҰӮжҲ‘д»¬дёӢиҪҪзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңпјүпјҢonPreExecuteжҳҜеңЁdoInBackgroundжү§иЎҢе®ҢжҜ•ж—¶иҝӣиЎҢзҡ„ж“ҚдҪңпјҢеңЁиҝҷйҮҢжҲ‘д»¬еҸҜд»ҘиҝӣиЎҢдёҖдәӣUIзҡ„жӣҙж–°зӯүгҖӮ еҘҪдәҶпјҢз”Ёжі•д»Җд№Ҳзҡ„е°ұдёҚеҶҚиҜҙдәҶпјҢжҲ‘д»¬жқҘзңӢдёҖдёӢе®ғеҲ°еә•жҳҜжҖҺд№Ҳе®һзҺ°иҝҷж ·зҡ„зәҝзЁӢеҲҮжҚўд»ҘеҸҠdoInBackgroundеҲ°еә•жҳҜжҖҺд№Ҳжү§иЎҢж“ҚдҪңзҡ„еҗ§пјҡ private static final BlockingQueue sPoolWorkQueue = new LinkedBlockingQueue(128); /** An {@link Executor} that can be used to execute tasks in parallel. */ public static final Executor THREAD_POOL_EXECUTOR; static { ThreadPoolExecutor threadPoolExecutor = new ThreadPoolExecutor(CORE_POOL_SIZE, MAXIMUM_POOL_SIZE, KEEP_ALIVE_SECONDS, TimeUnit.SECONDS, sPoolWorkQueue, sThreadFactory); threadPoolExecutor.allowCoreThreadTimeOut(true); THREAD_POOL_EXECUTOR = threadPoolExecutor; } еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°пјҢеңЁиҝҷдёӘзұ»дёӯж–°е»әдәҶдёҖдёӘsPoolWorkQueueпјҢиҝҷжҳҜдёҖдёӘз”ұй“ҫиЎЁз»„жҲҗзҡ„йҳ»еЎһйҳҹеҲ—гҖӮз„¶еҗҺйҖҡиҝҮиҝҷдёӘйҳ»еЎһйҳҹеҲ—еҲӣе»әдәҶдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢжұ threadPoolExecutorгҖӮдёӢйқўзңӢдёҖдёӢе…¶д»–зҡ„еҸӮж•°пјҡ private static final int CPU_COUNT = Runtime.getRuntime().availableProcessors();// We want at least 2 threads and at most 4 threads in the core pool,// preferring to have 1 less than the CPU count to avoid saturating// the CPU with background workprivate static final int CORE_POOL_SIZE = Math.max(2, Math.min(CPU_COUNT - 1, 4));private static final int MAXIMUM_POOL_SIZE = CPU_COUNT * 2 + 1;private static final int KEEP_ALIVE_SECONDS = 30;еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°йҖҡиҝҮCPU_COUNTиҝ”еӣһеҸҜз”ЁеӨ„зҗҶеҷЁзҡ„JavaиҷҡжӢҹжңәзҡ„ж•°йҮҸз„¶еҗҺжһ„е»әдёҖдёӘзәҝзЁӢжұ гҖӮдёӢйқўзңӢдёҖдёӢdoInBackgroundзҡ„е®һзҺ°: mWorker = new WorkerRunnable<Params, Result>() { public Result call() throws Exception { mTaskInvoked.set(true); Result result = null; try { Process.setThreadPriority(Process.THREAD_PRIORITY_BACKGROUND); //noinspection unchecked result = doInBackground(mParams); Binder.flushPendingCommands(); } catch (Throwable tr) { mCancelled.set(true); throw tr; } finally { postResult(result); } return result; } };еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°ж•ҙеҗҲеҗ„WorkerRunnableе®һзҺ°зҡ„жҳҜдјҡеҫҲе°‘з”ЁеҲ°зҡ„CallableжҺҘеҸЈпјҢеңЁе®ғзҡ„callж–№жі•дёӯи°ғз”ЁдәҶdoInBackgroundж–№жі•е№¶иҺ·еҸ–еҲ°дәҶResultгҖӮдёӢйқўжҲ‘д»¬зңӢдёҖдёӢAsyncTaskзҡ„exexuteзҡ„жү§иЎҢиҝҮзЁӢ: @MainThreadpublic final AsyncTask<Params, Progress, Result> execute(ParamsвҖҰ params) { return executeOnExecutor(sDefaultExecutor, params);} @MainThreadpublic final AsyncTask<Params, Progress, Result> executeOnExecutor(Executor exec, ParamsвҖҰ params) { if (mStatus != Status.PENDING) { switch (mStatus) { case RUNNING: throw new IllegalStateException(вҖңCannot execute task:вҖқ + " the task is already running."); case FINISHED: throw new IllegalStateException("Cannot execute task:" + " the task has already been executed " + "(a task can be executed only once)"); } } mStatus = Status.RUNNING; onPreExecute(); mWorker.mParams = params; exec.execute(mFuture);//1 return this; }жҲ‘д»¬зңӢеҲ°е…ҲжҳҜи°ғз”ЁдәҶexecuteOnExecutorж–№жі•пјҢз„¶еҗҺеҲӨж–ӯдёҖдёӢе®ғзҡ„зҠ¶жҖҒпјҢеҰӮжһңжҳҜеңЁиҝҗиЎҢе’Ңе®ҢжҲҗйғҪдјҡжҠӣеҮәејӮеёёгҖӮеҗҰеҲҷе°ҶзҠ¶жҖҒи®ҫзҪ®дёәиҝҗиЎҢдёӯпјҢе№¶и°ғз”ЁonPreExecuteж–№жі•,д№ӢеҗҺи°ғз”ЁдёҠйқўжіЁйҮҠ1еӨ„зҡ„ж–№жі•пјҢ mFuture = new FutureTask(mWorker) { @Override protected void done() { try { postResultIfNotInvoked(get()); } catch (InterruptedException e) { android.util.Log.w(LOG_TAG, e); } catch (ExecutionException e) { throw new RuntimeException(вҖңAn error occurred while executing doInBackground()вҖқ, e.getCause()); } catch (CancellationException e) { postResultIfNotInvoked(null); } } };еңЁдёҠйқўжҲ‘д»¬иҜҙиҝҮпјҢmWorkerз»§жүҝдәҶCallableжҺҘеҸЈпјҢиҝҷйҮҢзҡ„mFutureжҳҜдёҖдёӘFutureTaskе®һзҺ°дәҶRunnableе’ҢCallableдёӨдёӘжҺҘеҸЈпјҢжҺҘзқҖжҲ‘д»¬зңӢpostResultIfNotInvokedиҝҷдёӘж–№жі•пјҡ private void postResultIfNotInvoked(Result result) { final boolean wasTaskInvoked = mTaskInvoked.get(); if (!wasTaskInvoked) { postResult(result); }} private Result postResult(Result result) { @SuppressWarnings(вҖңuncheckedвҖқ) Message message = getHandler().obtainMessage(MESSAGE_POST_RESULT, new AsyncTaskResult(this, result)); message.sendToTarget(); return result;}еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°еңЁpostResultж–№жі•дёӯеҲӣе»әдәҶж–°зҡ„MessageеҜ№иұЎпјҢеҲ°иҝҷйҮҢеӨ§е®¶жҳҜдёҚжҳҜйғҪжҳҺзҷҪдәҶпјҢйҖҡиҝҮgethHandlerж–№жі•еҫ—еҲ°Handlerе№¶йҖҡиҝҮиҝҷдёӘhandlerеҸ‘йҖҒж¶ҲжҒҜ mHandler = callbackLooper == null || callbackLooper == Looper.getMainLooper() ? getMainHandler() : new Handler(callbackLooper); private Handler getHandler() { return mHandler;} private static Handler getMainHandler() { synchronized (AsyncTask.class) { if (sHandler == null) { sHandler = new InternalHandler(Looper.getMainLooper()); } return sHandler; }} private static class InternalHandler extends Handler { public InternalHandler(Looper looper) { super(looper); } @SuppressWarnings({"unchecked", "RawUseOfParameterizedType"}) @Override public void handleMessage(Message msg) { AsyncTaskResult<?> result = (AsyncTaskResult<?>) msg.obj; switch (msg.what) { case MESSAGE_POST_RESULT: // There is only one result result.mTask.finish(result.mData[0]); break; case MESSAGE_POST_PROGRESS: result.mTask.onProgressUpdate(result.mData); break; } } } super(looper); }еҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°иҝҷдёӘHandlerе’ҢиҺ·еҸ–еҲ°зҡ„LooperеҜ№иұЎжҳҜMainLooperгҖӮеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°е®ҢжҲҗж—¶дјҡи°ғз”Ёfinishж–№жі•пјҡ private void finish(Result result) { if (isCancelled()) { onCancelled(result); } else { onPostExecute(result); } mStatus = Status.FINISHED;} зҺ°еңЁеҸҜд»ҘзңӢеҲ°еңЁз»“жқҹж—¶и°ғз”ЁдәҶpostExecuteж–№жі•е№¶е°ҶResultдј дәҶиҝҮеҺ»гҖӮеҘҪдәҶпјҢеҲ°иҝҷйҮҢеӨ§е®¶е°ұиҜҘжҳҺзҷҪиҝҷиҝҷж•ҙдёӘжү§иЎҢиҝҮзЁӢдәҶеҗ§гҖӮдҪңиҖ…пјҡзҲұеҗғи…Ҙзҡ„зҢ«жқҘжәҗпјҡCSDNеҺҹж–Үпјҡhttps://blog.csdn.net/qq_29451649/article/details/79706129зүҲжқғеЈ°жҳҺпјҡжң¬ж–ҮдёәеҚҡдё»еҺҹеҲӣж–Үз« пјҢиҪ¬иҪҪиҜ·йҷ„дёҠеҚҡж–Үй“ҫжҺҘпјҒ

posts.title: еӣҫзүҮеҠ ж°ҙеҚ°
posts.text: е…ідәҺдёҖдәӣеҜ№дәҺеӣҫзүҮж·»еҠ ж°ҙеҚ°зҡ„еӨ„зҗҶпјҢе…·дҪ“ж–№жі•еҰӮдёӢпјҡ `package yppcat.morethread;import android.graphics.Bitmap;import android.graphics.BitmapFactory;import android.graphics.Canvas;import android.graphics.Matrix;import android.util.Log;import android.view.View; import java.io.File;import java.io.FileOutputStream; /** Created by ж®·жңӢжңӢ on 19-1-28. */ public class BitmapUtils { private static final String TAG = вҖңBitmapUtilsвҖқ; /** * viewиҪ¬жҲҗbitmap (жӯӨж–№жі•еңЁдҪҺеҲҶиҫЁзҺҮжүӢжңәдёҠжңүеҸҜиғҪеҮәзҺ°иҝ”еӣһnull,еҸҜйҖүз”ЁдёӢйқўзҡ„йҮҚиҪҪж–№жі•) * * @param view жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„view * @return еӣҫзүҮеӨ§е°Ҹе’ҢviewеӨ§е°ҸзӣёеҗҢ */ public static Bitmap convertViewToBitmap(View view) { view.measure(View.MeasureSpec.makeMeasureSpec(0, View.MeasureSpec.UNSPECIFIED), View.MeasureSpec.makeMeasureSpec(0, View.MeasureSpec.UNSPECIFIED)); view.layout(0, 0, view.getMeasuredWidth(), view.getMeasuredHeight()); view.buildDrawingCache(); Bitmap bitmap = view.getDrawingCache(); if (bitmap == null) { Log.d(TAG, "bitmap is null"); return null; } return bitmap; } /** * view иҪ¬жҚўbitmap * @param view жҢҮе®ҡзҡ„view * @param width еӣҫзүҮзҡ„е®Ҫ * @param height еӣҫзүҮзҡ„й«ҳ * @return еӣҫзүҮ */ public static Bitmap convertViewToBitmap(View view, int width, int height) { Bitmap bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(width, height, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888); view.draw(new Canvas(bitmap)); if (bitmap == null) { Log.d(TAG, "bitmap is null"); return null; } return bitmap; } /** * еҲӣе»әж°ҙеҚ°bitmap * * @param src еҺҹеӣҫ * @param watermark ж°ҙеҚ°еӣҫ * @return еҠ е®Ңж°ҙеҚ°зҡ„еӣҫзүҮ */ public static Bitmap createWatermarkBitmap(Bitmap src, Bitmap watermark) { if (src == null || watermark == null) { return null; } int w = src.getWidth(); //иҺ·еҸ–еӣҫзүҮзҡ„е®Ҫй«ҳ int h = src.getHeight(); int ww = watermark.getWidth(); //иҺ·еҸ–ж°ҙеҚ°е®Ҫй«ҳ int wh = watermark.getHeight(); Bitmap newb = Bitmap.createBitmap(w, h, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888);//еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„е’ҢSRCй•ҝеәҰе®ҪеәҰдёҖж ·зҡ„дҪҚеӣҫ Canvas cv = new Canvas(newb); cv.drawBitmap(src, 0, 0, null);//еңЁ 0пјҢ0еқҗж ҮејҖе§Ӣз”»е…Ҙsrc cv.drawBitmap(watermark, w - ww - 5, h - wh - 5, null);//еңЁsrcзҡ„еҸідёӢи§’з”»е…Ҙж°ҙеҚ° дҪҚзҪ®еҸҜиҮӘе®ҡд№ү cv.save(Canvas.ALL_SAVE_FLAG);//дҝқеӯҳ cv.restore();//еӯҳеӮЁ return newb; } /** * еҲӣе»әж°ҙеҚ°bitmap * @param src еҺҹеӣҫ */ public static Bitmap createWatermarkBitmap(Bitmap src) { Bitmap watermark = BitmapFactory.decodeResource(App.getContext().getResources(), R.mipmap.water_mark); return createWatermarkBitmap(src, watermark); } /** * е°ҶbitmapдҝқеӯҳеҲ°жң¬ең° * @param path ж–Үд»¶зӣ®еҪ• * @param mBitmap еӣҫзүҮ * @param quality еӣҫзүҮиҙЁйҮҸ 0-100 * @return жҳҜеҗҰдҝқеӯҳжҲҗеҠҹ */ public static boolean saveBitmap(String path, Bitmap mBitmap, int quality) { File f = new File(path); if (f.exists()) f.delete(); try { FileOutputStream out = new FileOutputStream(f); mBitmap.compress(Bitmap.CompressFormat.PNG, quality, out); out.flush(); out.close(); return true; } catch (Exception e) { e.printStackTrace(); } return false; } /** * * @param src еҺҹеӣҫ * @param watermark ж°ҙеҚ°еӣҫзүҮ * @param paddingLeft ж°ҙе№іж–№еҗ‘еҒҸз§»йҮҸ * @param paddingTop з«–зӣҙж–№еҗ‘еҒҸз§»йҮҸ * @return еҠ е®Ңж°ҙеҚ°зҡ„еӣҫзүҮ */ public static Bitmap createWaterMaskBitmap(Bitmap src, Bitmap watermark, int paddingLeft, int paddingTop) { if (src == null) { return null; } int width = src.getWidth(); int height = src.getHeight(); //еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘbitmap Bitmap newBitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(width, height, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888);// еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘж–°зҡ„е’ҢSRCй•ҝеәҰе®ҪеәҰдёҖж ·зҡ„дҪҚеӣҫ //е°ҶиҜҘеӣҫзүҮдҪңдёәз”»еёғ Canvas canvas = new Canvas(newBitmap); //еңЁз”»еёғ 0пјҢ0еқҗж ҮдёҠејҖе§Ӣз»ҳеҲ¶еҺҹе§ӢеӣҫзүҮ canvas.drawBitmap(src, 0, 0, null); //еңЁз”»еёғдёҠз»ҳеҲ¶ж°ҙеҚ°еӣҫзүҮ canvas.drawBitmap(watermark, paddingLeft, paddingTop, null); // дҝқеӯҳ canvas.save(Canvas.ALL_SAVE_FLAG); // еӯҳеӮЁ canvas.restore(); return newBitmap; } /** * ж №жҚ®з»ҷе®ҡзҡ„е®Ҫе’Ңй«ҳиҝӣиЎҢжӢүдјё * * @param origin еҺҹеӣҫ * @param newWidth ж–°еӣҫзҡ„е®Ҫ * @param newHeight ж–°еӣҫзҡ„й«ҳ * @return new Bitmap */ public static Bitmap scaleBitmap(Bitmap origin, int newWidth, int newHeight) { if (origin == null) { return null; } int height = origin.getHeight(); int width = origin.getWidth(); float scaleWidth = ((float) newWidth) / width; float scaleHeight = ((float) newHeight) / height; Matrix matrix = new Matrix(); matrix.postScale(scaleWidth, scaleHeight);// дҪҝз”ЁеҗҺд№ҳ Bitmap newBM = Bitmap.createBitmap(origin, 0, 0, width, height, matrix, false); if (!origin.isRecycled()) { origin.recycle(); } return newBM; } /** * еӣһж”¶bitmap * * @param bitmaps ж•°з»„ */ public static void recycleBitmaps(Bitmap... bitmaps) { if (bitmaps != null && bitmaps.length > 0) { for (Bitmap bitmap : bitmaps) { if (bitmap != null) { if (!bitmap.isRecycled()) { bitmap.recycle(); } bitmap = null; } } } } }`
